validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK). Restore first: dotnet restore. Available targets: net8.0, net9.0, net10.0. net9.0/net8.0 require restore before first build.

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: reduce allocations in BFSTestNodeVisitor path tracking and CreateWrappedName
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate state-machine allocations in PropertyBag.Single<T>() and SingleOrDefault<T>()

open_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: skip PropertyBag construction in BFSTestNodeVisitor when filter has no property expressions
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate yield-iterator state machine in PropertyBag.OfType<T>()

backlog.title: Scan for more hot-path allocation opportunities in Microsoft.Testing.Platform
backlog.notes: Focus on: Extension callbacks during test run, MessageBus dispatch path

backlog.title: AbortForMaxFailedTestsExtension: LINQ Any with lambda vs Array.IndexOf
backlog.notes: Uses .Any(t => t == ...) with delegate allocation; Array.IndexOf would be more consistent and avoids closure allocation

notes.pr7901: All CI green. Evangelink asked @copilot to address review comments. Copilot SWE agent addressed them (commit 53855c0). Awaiting human review.
notes.issue7884: Monthly activity April 2026 - closed by Evangelink 2026-04-28 as 'completed'. New issue created 2026-04-29.
notes.propertybag_structure: PropertyBag uses immutable linked-list (Property class). Direct walk via current.Next avoids yield state machine allocation.
notes.propertybag_oftype: PropertyBag.OfType<T>() now does direct linked-list walk (no state-machine). Added 2026-04-29.
notes.treenodefilter_containspropertyfilters: Added internal bool ContainsPropertyFilters to TreeNodeFilter (computed at parse time). Used in BFSTestNodeVisitor to skip PropertyBag construction in common case (path-only filters).
